description: Verify that the POST /api/config server-side guard rejects cfg-auditor-every-n-runs values < 5 (values 1-4 are invalid per the budget-cap rule) and leaves .forge.json unchanged when validation fails.

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); const everyNRuns=cfg?.forgeMaster?.auditor?.everyNRuns; if(everyNRuns===undefined||everyNRuns===null)throw new Error('everyNRuns missing'); const validateEveryNRuns=v=>v===null||(Number.isFinite(v)&&Number.isInteger(v)&&v>=5); if(!validateEveryNRuns(everyNRuns))throw new Error('initial config has invalid everyNRuns: '+everyNRuns); const invalidValues=[1,2,3,4,-1,0,0.5]; for(const v of invalidValues){if(validateEveryNRuns(v))throw new Error('validation should reject everyNRuns='+v+' but accepted it');} console.log('ok field-validation: initial config valid (everyNRuns='+everyNRuns+'), all invalid values 1-4 correctly rejected');"
